title: Arjuneswarar
tagline: Arjuneswarar — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Arjuneswarar Koil is situated on the banks of Amaravathi River in Kadathur village, in Tiruppur district.
overview.description: Arjuneswarar Koil is situated on the banks of Amaravathi River in Kadathur village, in Tiruppur district. The main deity, Moolavar in this temple is Arjuneswarar. The alternate names for the Moolavar are Marudheesar, Marudhudaiyar and Marundheesar. The consort of the main deity is worshiped in the name of Gomathi Amman.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Ponnapuram
topPlaces.description: Ponnapuram is a village in the Dharapuram taluk within the Tirupur district of Tamil Nadu, India. Agriculture is the main occupation along with vegetable exporting and the generation of power using windmills.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Arjuneswarar?
faq.a: The best time to visit Arjuneswarar is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (60 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (63 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Arjuneswarar?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Arjuneswarar at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Arjuneswarar?
faq.a: Stays in Arjuneswarar start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Arjuneswarar?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kadathur, Tiruppur, Kaniyur, Tamil Nadu, Madathukulam taluk, Madathukulam, Ponnapuram.
